schemes.name: National Action Plan on Climate Change (NAPCC) — Solar Mission
schemes.benefit: Solar energy targets, incentives for solar adoption at household/community level
schemes.benefit_hi: घरेलू/सामुदायिक स्तर पर सौर ऊर्जा अपनाने के प्रोत्साहन
schemes.eligibility: Citizens, institutions installing solar in approved mission areas

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala + Clean Cooking Mission
schemes.benefit: Shift from biomass to LPG/PNG to reduce indoor air pollution
schemes.benefit_hi: इनडोर वायु प्रदूषण कम करने के लिए बायोमास से LPG/PNG में बदलाव
schemes.eligibility: Rural/slum households still using wood/coal for cooking

schemes.name: National Clean Air Programme (NCAP)
schemes.benefit: City-level action plans to reduce PM2.5/PM10 by 40% in 131 cities by 2026
schemes.benefit_hi: 131 शहरों में PM2.5/PM10 को 40% कम करना

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Urban & Rural)
schemes.benefit: Free toilet construction (Rs 12,000), SBA+ for solid/liquid waste management
schemes.eligibility: Households without toilets (rural) / all urban households for SBM

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana — Watershed
schemes.benefit: Watershed treatment for drought-prone areas — check dams, percolation ponds, afforestation
schemes.benefit_hi: सूखाग्रस्त क्षेत्रों में चेक डैम, परकोलेशन तालाब, वनीकरण
schemes.eligibility: Farmers and communities in notified watershed project areas

schemes.name: Green India Mission (GIM)
schemes.benefit: Afforestation, forest restoration, livelihood for forest-dependent communities
schemes.benefit_hi: वनरोपण, वन पुनरुद्धार, वन आश्रित समुदायों की आजीविका
schemes.eligibility: Communities near degraded forests and JFM committees

schemes.name: CAMPA (Compensatory Afforestation) Fund
schemes.benefit: Plantation activities, eco-restoration funding in states
schemes.benefit_hi: राज्यों में वृक्षारोपण एवं पारिस्थितिक पुनरुद्धार निधि
schemes.eligibility: Communities near forest areas benefiting from CAMPA works

schemes.name: National Coastal Mission
schemes.benefit: Mangrove restoration, coastal protection, livelihood for coastal fishing communities
schemes.benefit_hi: तटीय मछुआरा समुदाय के लिए मैंग्रोव पुनरुद्धार, आजीविका
schemes.eligibility: Coastal communities in 9 maritime states + Andaman, Lakshadweep

schemes.name: FAME India (EV Adoption)
schemes.benefit: Subsidy on electric vehicles to reduce vehicular pollution
schemes.benefit_hi: वाहन प्रदूषण घटाने के लिए EV पर सब्सिडी

schemes.name: National Biogas Programme
schemes.benefit: Rs 7,000-20,000 subsidy on biogas plants to replace wood fuel
schemes.benefit_hi: लकड़ी ईंधन बदलने के लिए बायोगैस संयंत्र पर ₹7,000-20,000 सब्सिडी

schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission (Clean Drinking Water)
schemes.benefit: Safe tap water to every rural household, reducing groundwater over-extraction
schemes.benefit_hi: हर ग्रामीण घर में सुरक्षित नल जल, भूजल संरक्षण
schemes.eligibility: All rural households without functional household tap connection

schemes.name: PM Kusum (Solar for Farmers)
schemes.benefit: 60% subsidy on solar pumps + income from surplus power sold to grid
schemes.benefit_hi: सौर पंप पर 60% सब्सिडी + ग्रिड को बिजली बेचकर अतिरिक्त आय
schemes.eligibility: All farmers (priority to diesel pump users)

schemes.name: MISHTI (Mangrove Initiative for Shoreline Habitats & Tangible Incomes)
schemes.benefit: Mangrove plantation along coastline + income for coastal communities from eco-tourism
schemes.benefit_hi: तटीय मैंग्रोव रोपण + पर्यावरण पर्यटन से तटीय समुदायों की आय

schemes.name: Amrit Dharohar Wetland Scheme
schemes.benefit: Conservation of 75 Ramsar wetlands, eco-tourism income for communities around them
schemes.benefit_hi: 75 रामसर आर्द्रभूमियों का संरक्षण + पर्यटन आय
